headline: DTE Energy's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Decrease Year Over Year
summary: DTE lags Q1 estimates with $1.95 EPS and a sharp YoY drop, while ramping grid investments and data center deals to drive growth.

raw.headline: DTE Energy's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Decrease Year Over Year

headline: A Look At CenterPoint Energy (CNP) Valuation As Steady Returns Contrast With Premium P/E Multiple
summary: What CenterPoint Energy’s recent performance data tells you CenterPoint Energy (CNP) has been drawing investor attention after a period where its month return was roughly flat and past 3 months total return reached about 8%, compared with a 1 year total return near 13%. See our latest analysis for CenterPoint Energy. At a share price of US$42.82, CenterPoint Energy’s recent 7 day share price return of 1.66% and 90 day share price return of 8.16% sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return...

headline: IDACORP Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
summary: IDA beats first-quarter EPS estimates on customer growth and rate changes, even as revenues fall y/y and miss expectations.
